response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the non-vocal talk segment from 00:00 to 03:26, involving merchandise announcements. 2. Identified the song 'Hikari no Sumika' (光のすみか) at 03:26. 3. Researched 'Hikari no Sumika' to confirm the original artist, Rei Yasuda. 4. Obtained the full lyrics in Japanese and an English translation. 5. Mapped the song performance to the scene starting at 03:26 until the end.
response.global_summary: The video starts with a merchandising announcement for a collaboration with the National Gallery, followed by a live performance of the song 'Hikari no Sumika' (光のすみか) by the ReGLOSS VTubers.

scenes.description: Introduction, merchandise announcement for the National Gallery collaboration.
Performance of the song 'Hikari no Sumika' by ReGLOSS VTubers.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
水面に映った藍 眩しく揺れる
手探りで 探してた 足りない私
ゆっくりと動き出した
何万年も前から
この時を約束されていたみたいにほら
風は歌い 雨は語り
たどり着くよ 光のすみかへ
幾重にも 重なってる
この 地球(ほし)の偶然
影の向こう 真実の色
見つけ出すよ 光のすみかを
一つでも 欠けていたら
きっと出会えてなかったね

飛べぬまま 見上げてた
透明な空から
真っ直ぐに 差し込んだ 優しい朝日
過ぎた季節が歪に
削った今という瞬き
どこにも同じものはないの
ほら生きてる証

風は歌い 雨は語り
たどり着くよ 光のすみかへ
幾重にも 重なってる
この 地球(ほし)の偶然
影の向こう 真実の色
見つけ出すよ 光のすみかを
一つでも 欠けていたら
きっと出会えてなかったね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The indigo reflected on the water surface sways dazzlingly
I was fumbling about, searching for my incomplete self
Slowly, it began to move
As if from tens of thousands of years ago
It was as if this moment had been promised, look
The wind sings, the rain tells a tale
We will reach it, the dwelling of light
Layer upon layer, overlapping
This coincidence of the Earth
Beyond the shadows, the color of truth
I will find it, the dwelling of light
If even one thing were missing
We surely wouldn't have met, right?

From the transparent sky I looked up at while unable to fly
A gentle morning sun shone straight down
The passing seasons distortedly
Wore down the twinkling moment that is now
Nothing is the same anywhere
Look, this is proof of living

The wind sings, the rain tells a tale
We will reach it, the dwelling of light
Layer upon layer, overlapping
This coincidence of the Earth
Beyond the shadows, the color of truth
I will find it, the dwelling of light
If even one thing were missing
We surely wouldn't have met, right?
